(Last Update: 6/19/2000)

 - First two DVD discs (Assault and Double Cross) to be released July 1st, will contain three episodes each with English/Japanese soundtracks.
 - Season 4 to air in September, first android tapes expected July 4th.
 - Graphic novels of DB and DBZ coming out from Viz in August and September, corresponding with the Japanese volumes 1 and 17.
 - DBZ Game for the PSX, PC, Mac, and possibly a Nintendo system due out Q1 2001.
 - Movie #4 coming subbed/dubbed sometime this year.



 - Akire
 - DB: Ultimate Passion
 - Ginga GIRI GIRI
 - Kienzan's Edge
 - Orange Star HS
 - Saiya-jin Vegeta
 - Season 3

If you could only choose one, which of the following would you like to see?

Japanese music
Voices from seasons 1 & 2
Japanese voices with sub-titles
Direct translation for dub scripts
I like it how it is

Current Features: Burger King Promotion

Monday - 06/19/2000

Mr.E @ 14:23 pst - Amazon.com...
Was I surprised to find out that the Ginyu: Assault DVD I had ordered from amazon.com is scheduled to get to my doorstep sometime this week. This contradicts rightstuf.com's estimate of July 1st. If you want that disc as early as possible, order it off amazon.com (Double Cross is slated for release in mid-July on Amazon). I will be making a full report once I get it.

Update: I've had some reliable sources almost guarantee me that the DVDs will not be released until July, and that they will be released at the same time. Amazon has probably made an error. However, there is still the off-chance that Amazon got a shipment somehow...so we will have to see...

Sunday - 06/18/2000

Mr.E @ 18:43 pst - Last Day of the Burger King Promotion...
Burger King will be clearing out its inventory of DBZ merchandise within the next few days to make way for another promotion. If you didn't get the action figures or the forms to order the exclusive tapes, this is your very last chance to do so. It's likely that there will be residuals hanging around for the next week, but very little will be left.

Mr.E @ 14:59 pst - Deaths List Added...
From the now defunct "Akire's Dragonball Domain," a list of characters who have either died a lot or not at all has been added as another area to our biographies section. This deaths guide was taken directly from Akire's old site with her permission, but is by no means complete. If you know of any of characters and when they have died, contact me. There are a few more sections from Akire's site I'd like to get up, so expect more of her stuff in the near future. Also, it's ALMOST summer for me (two more lousy days). My car's engine siezed after 3 weeks of use, so it's in the shop right now (It was brand new, so it's most likely a bad part or incompetence on the part of the engine guy). It's preventing me from traveling around, so I guess that's good for you guys... ^_^ I'm working on getting more scans up, more characters bios, and FINALLY finishing the damn episode guide. Be ready for an extensive report on the DVDs once they are released July 1st, along with other goodies...

Update: Thanks to your e-mails and a lengthy conversation with SkullMac, the list of deaths has nearly tripled in size. Almost every single character from the series is now listed, and we are probably missing only a couple (If any at all). Thanks everyone!

Kaio @ 14:44 pst - I Made an Update.
I figured my other post titles were so high-octane and exciting that if I made another hilarious pun or reference it would no doubt cause some of the more easily excitable visitors to go into cardiovascular shock. As a result, this title is a little more mundane. Anyway, as the title suggests, I made an update.

There are some new chapters added to the Fanfic Section, which include a whopping 27 chapters added to Twist of Fate.

I've also added some strategies and card images to the Card Game Section. Thanks to everyone who submitted strategies and images. Now I need images of promotional cards that meet the following conditions (these are error cards): A promotional card labelled P4, but with a picture of Goku, and a promotional card labeled P115, with an image of Nappa. If you happen to have either of these cards, you are EXTREMELY luckly, and I suggest you hold on to them at all costs.

Also, as many of you know, some Dragon Ball Z trading cards are now on the market. These are different from the Dragon Ball Z Colletible Card Game Cards. To quench your unquestionably growing curiosity, I bought a pack of each series from the comic store where I work and uploaded some images:

Series 1 Pack | Series 1 Card
Series 2 Pack | Series 2 Card
Series 3 Pack | Series 3 Card
Series 4 Pack | Series 4 Card

And that's all! Wow... I think that's a pretty big update.

Saturday - 06/17/2000

Mr.E @ 21:42 pst - Android Tapes Now Available for Pre-order...
Alright, alright...so I'm a day or two late...not the end of the world (Seems to be for some of you). Anyhow, the Android tapes are now available for pre-order at FUNimation's DBZ store. Personally, I would not waste my money on these tapes. As I have said time and time again, wait for the DVDs...

Mr.E @ 18:55 pst - Movie #4 Review...
Arguably the worst DBZ movie ever made, movie #4 has been added to our movie guide. Once again the paragraph is penned by Kalandril, author of the Dark Ki fanfic.

Also, I've added a few more roles to our voices section. None of the VAs I have attempted to contact have gotten back to me...so if anyone can help me out, send me an e-mail.

Mr.E @ 13:02 pst - EX to Return...
VegettoEX finally got a response from his host about what was up...here's what was said:

ummm..... ya, it appears that your site was forgotten in the transfer. The tech that moved that server goofed apparently as I don't see your website on the move logs. Every other website was transfered. Looks like someone's gonna get a pay cut....

So his host made an error when the server move took place...he's going to be uling everything back to his space, so it may take him a while to have his multimedia up and working.

Friday - 06/16/2000

SkullMac @ 22:46 pst - New Forum in Our Message Board: Tenchi Muyo
Its coming to Cartoon Network, and as we did with Gundam Wing, it has made its way into our Message Board. Why don't you head on over to the Message Board and brush up on your Tenchi? Speaking of Gundam Wing, our Gundam forum will be phased out as soon as I get a forum up on Gundam Lounge.

Kaio @ 18:04 pst - Oh Goku, You're Such a Card
Well I bet you thought I couldn't beat my last post in terms of bad puns. I sure showed you! Anyway, the Card Game feature has been granted its own section. With this update, I've modified many aspects of the section, but most importantly, I've completed the checklist. It now has images of all 250 cards (obtained from the official site, dbzcardgame.com), and includes the Burger King promotional cards, and the other promotional cards, though it doesn't have images of those. In addition, I have added a section for strategies. If you have any strategies for the game, I would greatly appreciate it if you email them to me. Thanks, and enjoy!

Thursday - 06/15/2000

Mr.E @ 09:49 pst - Announcing the Anime Fan Sites Network!
If you have been wondering why Skull and Kaio have been updating a little less lately, then this is your reason. Over the past two months they have been working on Gundam Lounge and Kenshin Web, two brand new sites dedicated to all things Gundam and Kenshin. The main network page Anime Fan Sites has links to all three sites, and acts as a hub. We hope to add more anime to the network over the summer (If you have been reading my posts, you will know what one of those is ;P). The only change you will see on Namek is that no more Gundam or Kenshin news will be announced on this site, and will now be found on their corresponding pages. Even after 2 months of work, the Lounge and Kenshin-web are still nowhere near as complete as Namek is...but they are getting there... ^_^ Enjoy everyone!

Mr.E @ 09:36 pst - Meri Returns!
After a week of downtime, the Temple o' Trunks has finally returned. Unfortunately, it seems that EX is still having some problems. Meri has added a lot of new stuff, so go check it out!

Kaio @ 08:27 pst - Fic Rhymes with _ _ _ _
No, you dirty boy, it's not "trick", besides, that wouldn't even fit in the four spaces. The correct word is "pick". And I say that because among the many fanfics updated, one of them is an Editor's Pick (that would be the Orion Saga). Anyway, lots of chapters have been added to the existing fanfictions in the Fanfic Section. Happy reading!

Also, the problem with formatting in the Fanfic Section has been fixed, and all fanfics now appear as they should. Man, it's good to be out of school.

Disclaimers
Planet Namek is just a fansite, we did NOT create Dragonball, nor did we have any part in the production process.

©2000, Bird Studio/Shueisha, Toei Animation. Licensed by FUNimation Productions, Inc. All Rights Reserved, or as otherwise directed by FUNimation. This site is not meant to infringe on any copyrights, it is simply here to encourage people to watch the Dragonball series.

Although we did not create the series, we did take a lot of time to work on this site and bring you original files and information. Please honor our efforts by not stealing our files/layout from us. Thank you.

Web Page Design © Planet Namek


Best viewed in 800 by 600 resolution or better & thousands of colors or more.
For the best experience, set your browser to view images "better" rather than "faster."
